actions.description: Classify query into intent categories: substitution_request, compliance_check, cost_analysis, formula_comparison, market_research, regulatory_lookup, general_question
actions.model: Fine-tuned DistilBERT classifier (97.2% accuracy on 10K labeled queries)

actions.description: Extract material names, CAS numbers, formula IDs, regulation names, concentration values, and olfactory descriptors
actions.model: spaCy NER + custom fragrance entity gazetteer (4,200 entries)

actions.description: Expand with synonyms (e.g., 'musk' → 'Galaxolide, Ethylene Brassylate, Muscenone, Habanolide') and regulatory aliases (e.g., 'IFRA limit' → 'IFRA QRA Category 4 restriction')
actions.method: Domain synonym graph with cosine similarity ≥ 0.7 from embedding space

actions.description: Extract numerical constraints (e.g., 'below 20 USD/kg', 'above 0.5%', 'within 3 months') with unit normalization

actions.query: Original + expanded query with weighted fields

actions.method: Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) — rank = 1/(k + rank_dense) + 1/(k + rank_sparse), k=60

actions.output: Top 10 reranked results with relevance scores

actions.description: Retrieve full text chunks for top-10 results from source databases
Remove near-duplicate chunks (Jaccard similarity > 0.85 in sentence space)
Order by relevance × source_authority. Authority weights: IFRA=1.0, Research Papers=0.85, Internal Formulas=0.80, Supplier Catalogs=0.75, Market Reports=0.65, Customer Notes=0.50
Extract source metadata (document_id, page, paragraph, excerpt) for each chunk
Truncate to fit generation model context window (max 100K tokens for context, leaving 28K for generation)
actions.strategy: Priority-based drop: lowest-authority chunks dropped first

actions.model_fallback: Llama-3-70B (self-hosted, used when OpenAI API unavailable or cost threshold exceeded)

actions.method: Post-generation verification that each factual claim maps to a retrieved chunk; insert inline [N] markers
Generate confidence score based on: (avg retrieval relevance × 0.4) + (source authority × 0.3) + (answer consistency check × 0.3)
SelfCheckGPT — compare generated answer against retrieved context; flag claims not supported by any chunk
For compliance queries: cross-reference generated IFRA limits/categories against structured IFRA database; flag discrepancies

NLI (Natural Language Inference) model scores each sentence as entailed/contradicted/neutral vs. retrieved chunks. Overall consistency ≥ 0.85 required for answer delivery; below 0.85 triggers 'I cannot confidently answer this' response

substitution_request.focus: Molecular similarity, cost comparison, sensory equivalence
substitution_request.rerank_boost: Boost materials with confirmed supplier availability

compliance_check.focus: Exact regulatory text, category-specific limits, QRA calculations

cost_analysis.focus: Current pricing, volume discounts, price trends, alternative sourcing

formula_comparison.focus: Compositional similarity, olfactory space mapping, cost/performance diff

market_research.secondary_source: Internal Formula Library (for portfolio gap analysis)
market_research.focus: Segment trends, consumer preferences, competitive positioning

regulatory_lookup.focus: Precise regulatory text, effective dates, category definitions
